title: Fishy
description: A fish mod with variable sizes and rarity
body:
# FISHY
Fishy is a fish mod focused on the fun of collecting and catching new rare fish. Fishes have variable sizes and 5 different rarities which appear on their tooltips :)
![Showcases various new fish variants and the new rarity and size tooltips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3c1cb6993b8af1e9302fc829ff4fcb474f343ec.png)
